title: Checkout
description: Multi-step checkout with hidden A/B test variants, address books, shipping options, promo codes, gift wrapping, upsell widgets, and trust badges.
challenges: Hidden A/B test variant button with alternate checkout flow
Address book with saved addresses vs new address form
Promo code section hidden behind toggle
Upsell widget looks like part of checkout
Trust badges and decorative SVGs add noise

task.goal: Complete shipping step with Express shipping and continue to payment Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Finds hidden A/B test button, upsell add buttons, multiple forms

Finds new address form (hidden) and saved address — unclear state
Accidentally clicks upsell widget Add button
Re-parses DOM to verify step change
